headline: BofA Lowers PT on Fair Isaac (FICO) Stock
summary: Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE:FICO) is one of the Best Wide Moat Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts. On May 21, BofA reduced its price objective on the company’s stock to $1,400 from $1,550 and kept a “Buy” rating on the shares. Notably, the firm adjusted its price targets in the overall business and […]
